background.stage43a_finding: Stage43-A found no naturalistic external validation source inside the ContraMamba repository.

epistemicbert_prior.main_dataset: Uploaded EpistemicBERT code confirms tals/vitaminc as the original main fact-verification dataset loaded with load_dataset("tals/vitaminc").
epistemicbert_prior.transfer_dataset: Uploaded EpistemicBERT code confirms climate_fever as a prior cross-domain fact-verification transfer dataset.
epistemicbert_prior.climate_fever_disputed_policy: DISPUTED is excluded for clean 3-way evaluation and must not be mapped to NOT_ENTITLED.

stage43b1.purpose: Acquire/convert targeted VitaminC or Climate-FEVER HuggingFace rows into Stage43 canonical external validation JSONL plus provenance reports.
stage43b1.scope: Preparation/acquisition only. No dataset download or acquisition script execution was performed during implementation.

source_priority.rationale: VitaminC and Climate-FEVER are preferred over RTE/MNLI/SNLI because they directly support SUPPORT/REFUTE/NOT_ENTITLED-style fact verification.
source_priority.rte_policy: RTE is not a primary test because not_entailment conflates contradiction and insufficient evidence.
source_priority.mnli_snli_policy: MNLI/SNLI can be used later only as auxiliary NLI transfer diagnostics.

stage43b2_gate: Stage43-B2 should run ContraMamba external final-composer evaluation only after valid acquisition reports exist.
leakage_policy: Acquired data must not be used for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, loss design, or any other model-selection feedback loop.
guardrails: Do not run the acquisition script during implementation.
Do not download data during implementation.
Do not run model training or evaluation.
Do not infer labels from model predictions.
Do not treat RTE/MNLI/SNLI as primary Stage43 external validation.
Do not treat synthetic Stage34/35 as naturalistic external evidence.
Do not alter existing source reports or previous stage outputs.
recommendation: Acquire VitaminC and/or Climate-FEVER with the targeted Stage43-B1 script only when the user explicitly runs it later, then proceed to Stage43-B2 eval-only work only after valid acquisition reports exist.
